sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 104:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 104:1
items.html: The vessels of every Partzuf are made of the vessels of the upper Partzuf after the departure of their lights from them. Similarly, the vessels of Nekudim were made of the vessels of the lower nine of SAG that the light departed from them during the restriction of NHY. (Inner Light, Item 38)
